title: Expenses Exhaust.
content:
Live with a thrifty, not a needy fate;
    Small shots paid often waste a vast estate.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Expenses Exhaust.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
